examples.title: LSTM Forward Pass
examples.code:
function LSTM_step(x_t, h_prev, C_prev):
  i = σ(W_xi*x_t + W_hi*h_prev + b_i)
  f = σ(W_xf*x_t + W_hf*h_prev + b_f)
  o = σ(W_xo*x_t + W_ho*h_prev + b_o)
  Ĉ = tanh(W_xc*x_t + W_hc*h_prev + b_c)
  C = f*C_prev + i*Ĉ
  h = o*tanh(C)
  return h, C
examples.explanation: Implements gate computations and cell state update
